headline: Gringo’s Goblins: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Gringo’s Goblins carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 70.60, led by Emeka Egbuka, Kyren Williams, and Davante Adams. The clearest lineup pressure point is the FLEX slot held by Jonathon Brooks at 52.6 C-AVI.

recent_trades.summary: On July 8, Gringo’s Goblins traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired Tre' Harris, Emeka Egbuka, Kyren Williams, 2027 Round 1 (original roster 9) while sending Omarion Hampton, Chris Godwin, A.J. Brown, 2027 Round 2 (original roster 15). Tre' Harris is now on the current roster at 40.9 C-AVI and 64.2 D-AVI; Emeka Egbuka is now the verified WR starter at 85.5 C-AVI and 86.5 D-AVI; Kyren Williams is now the verified RB starter at 83.3 C-AVI and 83.8 D-AVI. The transaction moved out 1 draft asset, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks. It added 1 draft asset to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Emeka Egbuka (85.5), Kyren Williams (83.3), and Davante Adams (80.3).

sections.title: Recent Trade Impact
sections.body: On July 8, Gringo’s Goblins traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired Tre' Harris, Emeka Egbuka, Kyren Williams, 2027 Round 1 (original roster 9) while sending Omarion Hampton, Chris Godwin, A.J. Brown, 2027 Round 2 (original roster 15). Tre' Harris is now on the current roster at 40.9 C-AVI and 64.2 D-AVI; Emeka Egbuka is now the verified WR starter at 85.5 C-AVI and 86.5 D-AVI; Kyren Williams is now the verified RB starter at 83.3 C-AVI and 83.8 D-AVI. The transaction moved out 1 draft asset, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks. It added 1 draft asset to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Jonathon Brooks is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 52.6. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 10 offensive players, with 2 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 74.99.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 10 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
